Figure 5

Siyuan Huang

2025-12-06

Load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(lemon)
library(showtext)
library(Rmisc)
library(patchwork)

Font and theme settings

showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

# Register the Arial font if present (its path varies by OS); otherwise fall
# back to the default sans-serif family so figures render on any machine.
arial_path <- c(
  "C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf",                        # Windows
  "/Library/Fonts/Arial.ttf",                          # macOS
  "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/Arial.ttf"  # Linux (msttcorefonts)
)
arial_path <- arial_path[file.exists(arial_path)][1]

if (!is.na(arial_path)) {
  font_add(family = "Arial", regular = arial_path)
  theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "Arial"))
} else {
  theme_set(theme_classic())
}

Load utilities and import data

source("plot_util_test.R")

data_raw <- read_excel("data/Plot_Data.xlsx")

data_filtered <- data_raw[data_raw$stage1_task0_accuracy < 0.9, ]

Panel (a): Task accuracy across phases (follow-up completers)

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c(
  "Label",
  "stage1_task0_accuracy",
  "stage2_task0_accuracy",
  "stage3_task0_accuracy",
  "follow_task0_accuracy"
)]

data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_task0_accuracy), ]

df_11 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered1,
  label_col = c(
    "Label",
    "stage1_task0_accuracy",
    "stage2_task0_accuracy",
    "stage3_task0_accuracy",
    "follow_task0_accuracy"
  ),
  new_columns_name = c("Label", "Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3", "Follow"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3", "Follow"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Accuracy",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers",
    "Follow-up"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c(
    "Independent \n work",
    "LLM-guided \n practice",
    "LLM-provided \n answers",
    ""
  ),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up"),
  groupby_col = "Label"
)

df_11_1 <- df_11$stats_summary %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean * 100,
    ci_pct = ci95 * 100
  )

fig11 <- ggplot(df_11_1, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 4, y = 50, label = "Chance",
    vjust = -0.55, hjust = 0.7,
    size = 13 / .pt, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    3.55,
    y = 97, label = "Delayed\ntest",
    hjust = 0, vjust = 0.75,
    size = 13 / .pt, color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3.5, color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct, color = Label),
    width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Label, color = Label), size = 0.5, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Label, color = Label, shape = Label), size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("AI" = 21, "AI Human" = 22, "Human" = 24),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    limits = c(0, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 4, y = 0, yend = 0), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = expression(atop(
      bold("Statistical task accuracy across phases"),
      bold("(Stage 1-3 ") * bolditalic(N) * bold(" = 175; Follow-up ") * bolditalic(N) * bold(" = 84)")
    )),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Accuracy (%)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 4)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = c(0.19, 0.925),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "plain"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      title = NULL,
      order = 1,
      override.aes = list(
        linetype = "blank",
        fill = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
        color = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
        shape = c("AI" = 21, "AI Human" = 22, "Human" = 24),
        size = 4,
        stroke = 1
      )
    ),
    shape = "none",
    fill = "none"
  )

print(fig11)

Panel (b): Attrition check (all participants vs follow-up completers)

df_12_1 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered2,
  label_col = c("stage1_task0_accuracy", "stage2_task0_accuracy", "stage3_task0_accuracy"),
  new_columns_name = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Accuracy",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("Independent \n work", "LLM-guided \n practice", "LLM-provided \n answers"),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

df_12_2 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered,
  label_col = c("stage1_task0_accuracy", "stage2_task0_accuracy", "stage3_task0_accuracy"),
  new_columns_name = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Accuracy",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("Independent \n work", "LLM-guided \n practice", "LLM-provided \n answers"),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

df_12_1_plot <- df_12_1$stats_summary
df_12_2_plot <- df_12_2$stats_summary

df_12_2_plot$Label <- "All participants"
df_12_1_plot$Label <- "Follow-up completers"

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_12_1_plot, df_12_2_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("All participants", "Follow-up completers")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean * 100,
    ci_pct = ci95 * 100
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_plot))

fig12 <- ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Label, linetype = Label), color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Label, fill = Label), color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = 21, "Follow-up completers" = 21),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "black", "Follow-up completers" = "white"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "solid", "Follow-up completers" = "dashed"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:3,
    labels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
    expand = c(0.05, 0.05)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    limits = c(0, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 3, y = 0, yend = 0), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Attrition check \n(collapsed across labels)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Accuracy (%)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 4)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = c(0.43, 0.955),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      title = NULL,
      override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 1)
    ),
    shape = "none",
    linetype = "none"
  )

print(fig12)

Panel (c): Follow-up accuracy for early vs late corrected items

df_correction <- read_csv("data/Correction_Data.csv")

main_colors <- c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI + Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05")

p_values <- data.frame(
  Label = c("AI", "AI + Human", "Human"),
  label_text = c("italic(P)~'= 0.125'", "italic(P)~'< .001'", "italic(P)~'= 0.210'")
)

morey_sum <- summarySEwithin(
  data = df_correction,
  measurevar = "Measure",
  withinvars = "Group",
  betweenvars = "Label",
  idvar = "ID",
  na.rm = TRUE,
  conf.interval = 0.95
)

fig_13 <- ggplot(df_correction, aes(x = Group, y = Measure)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = ID), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = Measure, group = 1, color = Label),
    size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = Measure, ymin = Measure - ci, ymax = Measure + ci, color = Label),
    width = 0,
    size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = Measure, color = Label),
    size = 4,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Label, nrow = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = p_values,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = 98, label = label_text),
    size = 13 / .pt,
    parse = TRUE,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = main_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = main_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Accuracy (%)",
    title = "Follow-up accuracy for early- (Stage 2) \nvs late-corrected (Stage 3) items"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 20), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Early-corrected" = "Early", "Late-corrected" = "Late")) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, vjust = 1.5),
    panel.spacing = unit(-1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 4)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 4)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7))
  ) +
  coord_capped_cart(bottom = capped_horizontal(), left = capped_vertical())

print(fig_13)

Combine panels and save figure

combined_fig1 <- fig11 + fig12 + fig_13 +
  plot_layout(nrow = 1, widths = c(0.33, 0.30, 0.47)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a", tag_suffix = ".") &
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.tag.position = c(0.01, 0.99)
  )

print(combined_fig1)

ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_1.pdf", combined_fig1, width = 15, height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_1.png", combined_fig1, width = 15, height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_1.svg", combined_fig1, width = 15, height = 6, bg = "white")

Reproducibility

sessionInfo()
